title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 65/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 65/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 36.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Stephen it's not reasonable to expect the Prime Minister to have any kind of fixed belief or direction.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I remember Keir Starmer saying we should be at the “heart of Europe” as if it were only last week.
